pending_events.condition: Director approves with feedback applied (current state)

score_calculation.note: Score remains 0.4 until Director review (Stage 4). If Director approves this feedback-applied version: 0.4 + 0.1 = 0.5. Expert DB threshold is 0.6.

CC-001_QG6-003_difficulty_formula.detail: Difficulty formula now identical across all 3 documents. balance/difficulty_curve.yaml is canonical source. systems/balance.yaml (line 80) and layer2/system_spec.yaml (line 266) both reference canonical with 'CANONICAL FORMULA' / 'canonical_ref' labels. Weights [25,25,20,15,15] consistent. Sawtooth modifiers [0.7,0.85,0.95,1.0,0.6] unified. Example values recalculated and verified: L1=2.5 (correct), L30=29.9 (formula gives 29.94, rounded OK), L100=59.8 (formula gives 59.81, rounded OK), L200=83.1 (formula gives 83.13, rounded OK).

CC-003_sawtooth_modifiers.detail: systems/balance.yaml sawtooth_pattern.modifiers now [0.7, 0.85, 0.95, 1.0, 0.6] matching difficulty_curve.yaml exactly. Previously was [0.7, 0.8, 0.9, 1.0, 0.6].

QG3-001_dependency_notation.detail: L2 system_spec.yaml requires fields now use SystemName.Method() format. Specific fixes verified: BalloonController.requires changed from 'ObjectPool (Core)' to 'ObjectPool.Get()' + 'ObjectPool.Return()' (line 45-46). BoardStateManager.requires changed from 'BalloonController (all balloon data)' to 'BalloonController.GetAllBalloons()' (line 152). TutorialController.requires changed from 'UIManager (highlight, arrows)' to 'UIManager.ShowScreen()' (line 245). All now match L3 node references exactly.

QG6-001_base_score_definition.detail: systems/ingame.yaml now contains canonical definition at scoring.base_score_formula (line 107): 'base_score(L) = balloon_count(L) * base_pop = balloon_count(L) * 100'. Includes explicit note (lines 108-111) explaining it excludes chain_bonus, clear_bonus, dart_bonus. balance/difficulty_curve.yaml star_thresholds section (line 98) now references 'systems/ingame.yaml scoring.base_score_formula' and uses consistent 'base_score(L) = balloon_count(L) * 100' without chain_bonus_estimate conflation.

CC-005_chapter7_boss.detail: content/progression.yaml now includes Level 140 entry (line 129-133): 'Chapter 7 boss' with unlocks=['chapter_8'], boss=true. Progression chain is now complete: L100=Ch5/Ch6, L120=Ch6/Ch7, L140=Ch7/Ch8, L160=Ch8/Ch9, L180=Ch9/Ch10, L200=Ch10. All 10 chapters have boss levels at every 20th level.

GD-002_gimmick_tutorials.detail: content/level_design.yaml now includes 'gimmick_tutorial_hints' section (lines 126-141) with 7 popup guides at levels 15, 25, 35, 40, 50, 70, 90. Each entry specifies guide_type (popup/highlight), display text, and tutorial_level flag. Implementation note specifies buffer_multiplier=1.8 and low gimmick ratio (10-15%) for intro levels. Uses TutorialManager.ShowHighlight() integration.

gate1_naming.detail: No changes to system names. All 45 system names still match exactly across L1/L2/L3. Previously passed; still passes.

gate2_completeness.detail: No changes to L3 node count or system coverage. 45/45 = 100%. Phase 0+1: 25/25 = 100%. Previously passed; still passes.

gate3_dependency.detail: Previously FAILED due to L2 informal notation. Re-verified all 45 systems in L2 against L3 nodes. Key fixes confirmed: BalloonController (ObjectPool.Get/Return), BoardStateManager (BalloonController.GetAllBalloons), TutorialController (UIManager.ShowScreen). Remaining bare 'UIManager' references in PopupManager and TutorialManager L2 requires match L3 exactly (full-system dependency, acceptable). No structural mismatches remain. All method-level references now use SystemName.Method() format consistently.

gate4_logicFlow.detail: No changes to L3 logicFlow structure. Error paths exist implicitly in implementation blocks (ClearRateValidator warning/critical rules, DartManager misfire handling, ContinueHandler max limits). Conditional pass carried forward.

gate5_copyPaste.detail: No changes to codeHints/patterns. No identical patterns across 3+ nodes. Previously passed; still passes.

gate6_crossDoc.detail: Previously FAILED on: (a) difficulty formula inconsistency, (b) ambiguous base_score. Both fixed and verified. (a) All 3 documents now reference canonical formula in balance/difficulty_curve.yaml with identical weights and sawtooth modifiers. (b) base_score canonically defined as balloon_count*100 in systems/ingame.yaml with explicit note; all references updated. Currency names (coin/gem), balloon colors (8 colors), system names all remain consistent.

difficulty_formula_3way.examples_verified: L1=2.5, L30=29.9, L100=59.8, L200=83.1 all match formula to within rounding

progression_timeline.detail: All 10 boss levels present at levels 20,40,60,80,100,120,140,160,180,200. Chapter unlock chain complete: Ch1(L1)→Ch2(L20)→Ch3(L40)→Ch4(L60)→Ch5(L80)→Ch6(L100)→Ch7(L120)→Ch8(L140)→Ch9(L160)→Ch10(L180). No gaps.

carried_forward_warnings.description: Gem daily free source 8-11/day vs sink 20-30/day deficit. Not fixed in this iteration. Intentional design choice for IAP pressure, but flagged for Director awareness.
carried_forward_warnings.note: Designer did not claim this was fixed. Remains as design-intent warning for Director review.

carried_forward_warnings.description: Single-heart gem refill (50 gems) vs full refill (200 gems) availability in L3 not fully specified.
Tutorial Level 4 failure recovery flow not fully specified (is continue cost waived?).
Economy YAML needs structured format for balance-simulator.js automated parsing. Current descriptive format returns all-zero simulation.
carried_forward_warnings.note: Not blocking validation but limits automated monitoring capability.

carried_forward_warnings.description: L3 nodes use implementation blocks instead of formal logicFlow YAML. Error paths exist implicitly.
carried_forward_warnings.note: Accepted for this project. Recommended for future projects.

new_findings.description: LifeManager.requires has parenthetical annotation: 'CurrencyManager.SpendCurrency() (for gem refill)'. While not technically wrong, the annotation style is inconsistent with the pure SystemName.Method() format used elsewhere after the fix. L3 outgame_life_booster.yaml uses 'CurrencyManager.SpendCurrency() (gem refill)' which is a close but not identical string.
new_findings.suggestion: Minor. Strip parenthetical from L2 to match strict format, or accept as acceptable clarification comment.

new_findings.description: PopupManager and TutorialManager still list bare 'UIManager' without method suffix in L2 requires. This matches L3 exactly (both L2 and L3 use bare reference). This is acceptable for full-system architectural dependencies where no single method captures the relationship.
new_findings.suggestion: No action needed. Document convention: bare system name = full architectural dependency.

resolved_from_v1: CC-001: Difficulty formula unified (VERIFIED - 3 docs match, 4 examples verified by manual calculation)
CC-002: Example values recalculated (VERIFIED - L30=29.9 matches 29.94 rounded)
CC-003: Sawtooth modifiers unified (VERIFIED - [0.7,0.85,0.95,1.0,0.6] in all docs)
CC-005: Chapter 7 boss added at Level 140 (VERIFIED - complete 10-chapter chain)
GD-002: Gimmick tutorial hints added (VERIFIED - 7 hints at L15,25,35,40,50,70,90)
QG3-001: L2 dependency notation standardized (VERIFIED - ObjectPool.Get/Return, BalloonController.GetAllBalloons, UIManager.ShowScreen)
QG6-001: base_score canonically defined (VERIFIED - balloon_count*100, explicit note, all refs updated)
QG6-003: Cross-doc formula consistency (VERIFIED - same root fix as CC-001)
summary.verdict: PASS. All 4 error-severity blocking issues from v1 are verified fixed. All 6 Quality Gates pass. Design is ready for Director review (Stage 4).
strengths: All 53 required puzzle standard parameters covered
Unified canonical formula with clear source-of-truth references
Well-designed user journey with gimmick introduction tutorials
recommendations_for_director: CC-006: Gem economy deficit is aggressive for casual audience. Director should confirm this is intentional.
BV-001: Economy YAML should be restructured for simulator compatibility before Stage 7 (Play Verification).
3 orphan events (OnBalloonSpawned, OnBonusDartAwarded, OnBoardStateChanged) should be connected to subscribers or documented as analytics-only.
